metadata.title: Temporal-web bridge facts (1998->2026) - sources for the meta-graph
metadata.note: Backs models/graph/temporal_web.py / data/temporal_web.json. Each fact graded doc/assoc/struct. Sensitive (Epstein/Waters/threat-actor) items are documented-association only.

facts.claim: Larry Summers was Treasury Secretary during the 1999 Glass-Steagall repeal (GLBA, signed Nov 12 1999); joined OpenAI's board Nov 2023; resigned the board (and Harvard role) Nov 19 2025 after the House Oversight Committee released Epstein correspondence.
Sept 23 1998: 14 banks/brokers put $3.625B into LTCM in a Fed-facilitated private rescue; LTCM had ~$5B equity on >$125B borrowed (~30:1) - the 'too-interconnected-to-fail' template.

Enron (collapsed Dec 2001) used off-balance-sheet SPEs (LJM1/2, Chewco, JEDI, Raptors) + mark-to-market accounting to hide debt and book future/artificial profit - the structural ancestor of today's AI SPVs (Stargate/Hyperion) and RPO-as-revenue.

PayPal (1998: Thiel, Musk, Hoffman, Levchin, Sacks) seeded Palantir(2003), Facebook(2004 first investor), Founders Fund(2005), SpaceX, LinkedIn, and via the Thiel Fellowship funded Vitalik Buterin/Ethereum; Founders Fund seeded Anduril (2017).
Reid Hoffman: PayPal -> LinkedIn -> Microsoft board (2017) -> OpenAI board (to Mar 2023) -> Worldcoin investor -> Inflection AI. No Epstein tie found.

SBI Holdings (spun out of SoftBank in 1999) holds ~9% of Ripple (largest external stake); SBI Ripple Asia (2017); distributing RLUSD in Japan (Mar 2026); filed BTC+XRP ETFs. MUFG joined RippleNet. a16z, Ripple, SBI co-featured at XRP Tokyo 2026.
BIS Project Agora: 7 central banks + 40+ institutions (JPMorgan, HSBC, Deutsche, Swift, Mastercard, UBS) building a tokenized 'unified ledger' for cross-border payments; prototype 2025-2026.

EMVCo is jointly governed by the six card networks - Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, JCB, and China's UnionPay - a documented inter-network coordination body (payment standards/tokenization).
Fairshake (crypto super-PAC funded by Coinbase, a16z, Ripple, et al.) spent heavily to elect pro-crypto members of Congress, shaping the GENIUS Act / CLARITY Act environment that HFSC oversees.

Naspers/Prosus holds ~23% of Tencent; Tencent owns Riot Games (100%), ~40% of Epic, and stakes in Reddit, Snap, Universal Music; Alibaba owns SCMP and (via Ant Group) experimented early with Ethereum. (See influence-china-tech.json: mostly passive/non-voting; CCP golden shares reach only China-domestic subs.)

DPRK's Lazarus Group laundered crypto via Tornado Cash (OFAC-sanctioned 2022) and executed the Ronin and Bybit thefts on Ethereum; Samourai Wallet founders were charged by DOJ (2024). These illicit rails run on the same chains the crypto PACs are legalizing.

BRICS pursues SWIFT alternatives and de-dollarization; mBridge (BIS-incubated multi-CBDC platform, BIS exited 2024) and UnionPay form the parallel-bloc rails facing the Western Project Agora/SWIFT stack - the global settlement bifurcation.

Maxine Waters (HFSC ranking member): disclosed liabilities are ordinary mortgages; the OneUnited Bank matter (husband's stock/directorship to 2008; bank got $12.1M TARP) led to a 2010 House Ethics probe that CLEARED her in 2012 (reproval to her chief of staff). She opposed GENIUS and CLARITY. No current debt-leverage or foreign-leverage finding.
